title: fragaria viridis var. campestris
intro: Fragaria viridis var. campestris, also known as the wild strawberry or green strawberry, is a plant species in the Rosaceae family, characterized by its edible fruit and medicinal properties. Traditionally, the plant has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and astringent properties. The health benefits of Fragaria viridis var. campestris include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Fragaria viridis var. campestris can be prepared for medicinal use through infusion, decoction, or tincture, and its leaves, flowers, and roots can be used separately or combined for various herbal preparations.
